Our Story

قصتنا

Flowers that
speak before
words do.

زهور تتحدث
قبل الكلمات.

Tublum was born from a simple belief — that a beautifully arranged bouquet can turn an ordinary moment into a memory. Every arrangement we create is curated with intention, using the finest seasonal blooms.

وُلدت تبلم من إيمان بسيط — أن باقة زهور مرتبة بعناية يمكنها تحويل لحظة عادية إلى ذكرى لا تُنسى.

We are proud to deliver across Dubai, bringing carefully crafted arrangements directly to your door — fresh, beautiful, and on time.

نفخر بالتوصيل في جميع أنحاء دبي، مع الحفاظ على جودة كل تنسيق.

Fresh Always

Sourced and arranged daily

Curated Design

Every arrangement is intentional

Fast Delivery

Across Dubai, reliably

For Every Moment

Birthdays, gifts, occasions

Flowers, Curated for Every Moment.
